request: You are Reviewer R8: Observatory and user-visible proof reviewer for DinoBrain. Work read-only. Inspect <machine-local-path> docs\OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md, docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, scripts\dinobrain-observatory.mjs, src\health-status.ts, src\status-freshness.ts, and any Observatory/UI files found by rg 'Observatory|/api/state|health_status|visible_status|blocker'. Judge whether the plan completion conditions require UI/API visibility of used memories, blockers, pending reviewer/main/verifier lanes, stale proofs, audit/trust score, and CLI parity. Return reviewer_id=R8, verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections[], required_doc_changes[], evidence_files[].
